description_long: This object is a rectangular black parcel envelope with a flap closure on the front, secured by a circular yellow button. The front face features a subtle logo and the text 'CACADOR DE LENTS' in gold, along with a graphic of two books and a key. The envelope is slim and flat, with a rigid structure suggesting it is made from a sturdy material such as plastic or reinforced cardboard. The sides are extremely thin, emphasizing its flatness and compactness. The overall appearance is professional and secure, suitable for holding important documents or small items.
description: A slim, black rectangular parcel envelope with a yellow button closure and gold logo on the front. It has a professional, sturdy appearance and is designed for secure document storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flap closure with a yellow button and the main logo and text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the extreme thinness and flat profile of the envelope.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back surface with the logo and text more clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim, flat profile.
